ogTitle: Kiah vs Kiama Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kiah and Kiama Downs.
heading: Kiah vs Kiama Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kiah, New South Wales and Kiama Downs, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kiah has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Kiama Downs (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kiah or Kiama Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kiah has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Kiama Downs scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kiah scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Kiama Downs scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kiah or Kiama Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kiah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
